text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF National Death Index Segment Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 2.6 19 

ICD_CODE_358 

LABEL: 358 ICD-10 Cause of Death Recodes 

DESCRIPTION: This field groups (or recodes) the NDI ICD-10 code cause of death into 358 categories. The list reflects 
358 selected causes of death. 

SHORT NAME: ICD_CODE_358 

LONG NAME: ICD_CODE_358 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) National Death Index (NDI)
